infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Cashi uses the camera to attach a receipt photo to a transaction.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Cashi uses the photo library to attach an existing receipt photo to a transaction.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Cashi uses your location to attach optional coordinates to a transaction.

plugins.photosPermission: Cashi uses the photo library to attach an existing receipt photo to a transaction.
plugins.cameraPermission: Cashi uses the camera to attach a receipt photo to a transaction.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Cashi uses your location to attach optional coordinates to a transaction.
